top_signals.title: Oil Rally Cools as Traders Take Stock of Latest US-Iran Fighting
top_signals.summary: Oil eased from its biggest gain since May as traders assessed the outlook for Middle Eastern crude supplies after fresh hostilities between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US, Iran Trade Airstrikes as Fears Grow of a Return to War
top_signals.summary: The US military struck Iran for a second day and Tehran retaliated against American allies in the Persian Gulf, raising fears of a return to war after little progress in efforts to secure a diplomatic outcome.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Strikes Iran A Second Day; AI Rotation Trade on Watch | The Asia Trade 7/8/2026
top_signals.summary:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.

UPDATE: Bain says a special-purpose investment vehicle it set up for SK Hynix still holds a 14% stake in Kioxia. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Speech At the Fifth Conference on the International Roles of the Dollar, Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Defense Valuations Yet to Peak as Orders Surge, BNP Banker Says
top_signals.summary: European defense sector valuations still have plenty of upside, with government pledges to boost military spending now translating into orders, according to a top banker at BNP Paribas SA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkey’s Vestel Said to Start Work on Dollar Bond Restructuring
top_signals.summary: Turkey’s Vestel Elektronik is working with financial and legal advisers and is meeting bondholders to discuss a restructuring, while also renegotiating its loans with local banks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
